info.description: Authoritative FastAPI/NATS control plane for the Pocket Lab React PWA. Phase 12 serves existing /api contracts, publishes command/event traffic over NATS/JetStream, and adds an event-sourced workflow engine for complete state reconstruction, replay, and recovery.
info.title: Pocket Lab FastAPI/NATS Control API
